title: School Implementation Plan — Cohort A Submission
description: Upload your school-level Mirai STEM implementation plan. Must include timeline, assigned staff, equipment list, and student enrollment targets for Year 1.

title: Q1 Milestone Report — Mirai STEM Grant
description: Complete the Q1 milestone report template. Include student participation counts, professional development hours logged, and budget actuals vs. plan through December 30.

title: Equity Audit Data Analysis — School-Level Response
description: Review the disaggregated data for your school. Write a 1-2 page analysis identifying the top three equity gaps and the contributing factors you observe in your school context.

title: Draft Equity Recommendation — Working Group Input
description: Submit your working group's draft recommendation for the Board equity report. Include the evidence base, proposed action steps, resource estimates, and accountability measures.

title: Budget Reduction Priority Survey — FY2026-27
description: Rank the five proposed budget reduction areas (1 = highest priority for protection) and explain your top two choices in 3-4 sentences each. Responses are anonymous to the full group.

title: Bargaining Position Paper — Salary Schedule Analysis
description: Review the attached salary schedule comparisons for four comparable Oregon districts. Write a 2-page analysis of CRUSD's competitive position and implications for the upcoming negotiations.

title: MTSS Baseline Implementation Fidelity Survey
description: Complete the 25-item MTSS fidelity survey for your school. Rate each item 1-4 and provide brief evidence notes for any item rated 1 or 2. Estimated time: 30 minutes.

title: Google Workspace Module 1: Gmail and Drive Essentials
description: Complete the Gmail and Drive self-paced modules and pass the end-of-module quiz with 80% or higher. Upload your completion certificate screenshot to this assignment.

title: Google Classroom Module 2: Setting Up Your Classroom
description: Complete the Google Classroom setup module. Create a sample course, post one announcement, and upload one material. Screenshot your completed course and submit.

title: Bell Schedule Feedback Survey — Principal Input
description: Rate each of the four finalist bell schedule models on five dimensions: instructional time, staff workload, student transitions, community impact, and budget implications.

title: Crisis Communication Protocol — Acknowledgment and Quiz
description: Read the updated crisis communication protocol and complete the 10-question scenario quiz. A score of 80% or higher is required. You may retake once.

title: OSBA Module 1: Board Policy Authority — Completion Upload
description: Complete the OSBA online Module 1 and upload your completion certificate. This module is required for all Board members by November 15.

title: Annual Safety Certification — Modules 1-4 Completion
description: Complete all four required safety modules and pass each quiz with 80% or higher. Upload your aggregate completion report by January 31. Incomplete certifications will be reported to HR.

title: SIP Mid-Year Progress Report — Cedar Bluff HS
description: Submit the mid-year progress report for each of the 5 SIP goals. Include attendance data, assessment data, and a narrative update. Flag any goals that are off-track and propose adjustments.

title: New Employee Orientation — Module 5: Mandatory Reporter Training
description: Complete the Mandatory Reporter training module. You must pass the certification quiz with 100% to receive your certificate. Required by law within your first 5 working days.

title: Q3 Budget Actuals Upload — Mirai STEM Grant
description: Upload your school-level budget actuals spreadsheet for Q3 (July-September). Use the standard ODE expenditure template. Label your file SchoolName_STEM_Q3_Actuals.xlsx

title: School-Level SEL Assessment Results Analysis
description: Review your school's SEL assessment data and submit a 1-page analysis identifying the top two concern areas and your proposed Tier 2 response. Templates are provided in Materials.

title: Second Language Acquisition Module — Completion
description: Complete the updated SLA module (approx. 2 hours) and upload your ODE certificate of completion. Required for Dual Language teachers in years 1-3 by March 1.

title: FERPA Annual Recertification — 2025-26
description: Complete the 30-minute FERPA and student data privacy module. You must score 100% on the final quiz to receive credit. Your completion is automatically logged in PowerSchool.

title: CRT Year-End Reflection and Self-Assessment
description: Complete the CRT Year 1 end-of-year reflection survey. Rate yourself on 12 culturally responsive teaching indicators and describe one classroom practice you changed this year as a result of this PD.

title: Cohort B School Readiness Assessment
description: Complete the 20-item school readiness assessment for Mirai STEM Cohort B participation. Include your staffing plan, existing STEM infrastructure, and parent engagement strategy.

title: PAPEA Restorative Practices Case Study Response
description: Watch the Session 2 panel recording and submit a 300-word reflection on one restorative practice you plan to implement in your school or district in 2026-27.

title: Network Vendor Evaluation Rubric — IT Team Scores
description: Submit your individual vendor evaluation scores using the attached rubric. Score all three vendors on the seven criteria. The aggregated scores will inform the recommendation memo.

title: IEP Best Practices Scenario Exercise
description: Review the three provided IEP case scenarios and answer the 5 compliance questions for each. Answers must cite the relevant IDEA section or Oregon OAR. Due before the December 1 follow-up session.

title: MTSS Tier 2 Intervention Action Plan
description: Using your school's fidelity survey results, draft a Tier 2 intervention action plan identifying 2-3 priority areas, specific interventions, staff assignments, and a 12-week progress monitoring schedule.
